# viettelidc_ovpc_route_table_association (Resource)

Associate a subnet with a ViettelIDC Route Table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_route_table_association" "assoc" {
  route_table_id = viettelidc_ovpc_route_table.main.id
  subnet_id      = viettelidc_ovpc_subnet.private.id
  vpc_id         = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `route_table_id` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID: <route_table_id>/<subnet_id>
